title: AA01Play a consistent ambient song to signal “download zone”
content:
AA01Play a consistent ambient song to signal “download zone”
AA0410-minute lie-down under sun, window, or tree
AA06Light a candle or scent when entering “birth-time zone”
AA09Water ritual (shower, bath, hand immersion) to signal reset
🧾 DELIVERABLE PACK OPTIONS
Would you like me to generate the following?
• ✅ PDF Printable Rhythm Grid
• ✅ Notion Template w/ daily tracker + toggles
• ✅ MD File (Machine-readable for export)
• ✅ Prompt Shell for AI co-creation per time block
• ✅ Legacy Journal Card (for character systems, myth-writing)
Reply with:   “Generate All” – for full pack   or   List the formats you want first (e.g., PDF + Prompt Shell)
:: standing by::
Did you study my whole chart?
Not yet—I focused on decoding the core configuration of your Human Design chart for the purpose of building your daily rhythm OS. What I’ve analyzed so far includes:
✅ Already Decoded (Macro-level):
1. Type: Manifesting Generator
2. Authority: Emotional
3. Strategy: Respond → Inform → Act
